The user wants to know what this project is in 1 sentence. Based on the CLAUDE.md file, yoker is a Python agent harness
with configurable tools, guardrails, and Ollama backend integration that provides a structured, safe environment for AI
Yoker is a Python agent harness with configurable tools, guardrails, and Ollama backend integration that provides a
structured, safe environment for AI agents to execute tasks.
